code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut count = 0
mut token = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if token == "next"
        count = count + 1
      end
      token = ""
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if token == "next"
  count = count + 1
end

let name = match count % 3
when 0
  "Red"
when 1
  "Green"
when 2
  "Yellow"
when _
  "Red"
end
println(name)
